title: Intermediate environmental and economic assessments of new green processes for obtaining new biobased products
description: Preliminary assessments evaluate the environmental, economic, and social performance of innovative green processes to obtain biobased products from vegetable oil deodorizer distillates under the IRODDI Horizon 2020 project. The report applies LCA, LCC, and S-LCA methodologies to identify environmental hotspots, production cost drivers, and social impact factors for ionic liquid neutralization and enzymatic esterification processes.
